title: Developer Adoption Review
summary: Product signals from docs usage, support tickets, onboarding interviews, and pilot-team notes.

sources.title: Docs analytics
sources.excerpt: Quickstart completion rose to 58%, but teams still drop during local setup and credential configuration.

sources.title: Support digest
sources.excerpt: Most tickets mention environment drift, stale CLI versions, and unclear recovery steps after failed installs.

sources.title: Pilot interviews
sources.excerpt: Senior engineers value traceability and want generated recommendations tied back to source snippets.
